description: You are the transportation coordinator for Maplewood Unified School District. Configure the GPS settings to comply with state regulations and district safety policy. Navigation must guide drivers to arrive at stops on the correct side of the road (facing the same direction as traffic) and provide permanent lane guidance. Prohibit ferry crossings on all routes and set the measurement units to miles. Create a vehicle profile named 'School Bus' for a bus-type vehicle using diesel fuel, manufactured in 2020, with Euro 6 emissions.
